skills.name: Sand Blast
skills.description: Shoot hard sand at an enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2
Casting Time: 0.2 seconds

skills.name: Sand Wall
skills.description: Make sand soar from the ground to slow down enemies walking on it.
skills.effect_text:
Sand Duration: 5 seconds
Movement Speed: - CaptionRatio

skills.name: Stone Shower
skills.description: Shoot stone pieces in the direction the caster is facing. The pieces hit enemies continuously.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Rolling Stone
skills.description: Summon and manipulate a large rock. The rock moves for a while after channeling ends.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
Channeling Time: 5 seconds

skills.name: Implosion
skills.description: Cause a destructive resonance inside of an enemy in range. Partially ignores enemy’s Magic Defense. Critical Rate is increased by 20% if the enemy is inflicted with [Sandy Dust].
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 4
Casting Time: 1 second

skills.name: Horn of Golem
skills.description: Summon a Golem and it charges forward damaging enemies along the path.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4 times
Casting Time: 1 second
Targets: CaptionRatio

attributes.name: Sand Blast: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Sand Blast] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Sand Blast: Explosion
attributes.description:
* Deals damage equal to [Sand Blast Attribute level] * 20% to 4 nearby enemies if the target is inflicted with [Sandy Dust]

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Stone Shower: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Stone Shower] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Stone Shower: Stun
attributes.description:
* Inflicts 2-second [Stun] at a 2% chance per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Rolling Stone: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rolling Stone] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rolling Stone: Crush
attributes.description:
* [Rolling Stone] ignores [attribute level] * 3% of enemy Magic Defense

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Implosion: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Implosion] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Horn of Golem: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Horn of Golem] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts]Sand Blast: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Sand Blast] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Stone Shower: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Stone Shower] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Rolling Stone: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Rolling Stone] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Implosion: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Implosion] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Horn of Golem: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Horn of Golem] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Horn of Golem: Circle Trap
attributes.description: * [Horn of Golem]’s hit area changes into a circle. Sand soars from the ground slowing down enemies walking on it.

attributes.name: Terramancer: Sandy Dust
attributes.description:
* Ignores the damage reduction effect of [Petrified] status and increase Critical Rate by 20% when attacking enemy under [Petrified] by Terramancer skills

* Terramancer skills inflict [Sandy Dust] on the enemy

* Terramancer skills deal 20% increased damage to enemies inflicted with [Sandy Dust]

attributes.name: Terramancer: Critical Hit
attributes.description: * Minimum Critical Chance is applied by 2% per attribute level to the Terramancer skill

attributes.name: [Arts] Sand Wall: Quicksand
attributes.description:
* Deleted original function

* Inhales 80 range enemy every 0.5 seconds for 5 seconds

* Knockdown the enemy when time is up

Increases cooldown by 20 seconds

* Does not pull Boss or stationary monsters
